articles.title: The high-profile resignation of an Italian justice ministry official highlights how mafias exert their influence today
articles.author: Claudio Landi
articles.summary: The postThe high-profile resignation of an Italian justice ministry official highlights how mafias exert their influence todayappeared first onGlobal Initiative.
articles.analysis: La dimisión del funcionario italiano revela cómo las mafias han sofisticado su influencia institucional más allá de la coerción directa, operando ahora mediante presión estructural y captura regulatoria.

articles.title: How the Middle East conflict is creating the conditions for the convergence of criminal finance in Africa
articles.author: Claudio Landi
articles.summary: The postHow the Middle East conflict is creating the conditions for the convergence of criminal finance in Africaappeared first onGlobal Initiative.
articles.analysis: El análisis conecta el conflicto de Oriente Medio con la convergencia de finanzas criminales en África, evidenciando cómo los vacíos de gobernanza regional amplifican las redes transnacionales de blanqueo.

articles.title: ‘Half a victory’ – the implications of Daniel Kinahan’s arrest for transnational organized crime
articles.author: Claudio Landi
articles.summary: The post‘Half a victory’ – the implications of Daniel Kinahan’s arrest for transnational organized crimeappeared first onGlobal Initiative.
articles.analysis: La detención de Kinahan en Dubai marca un precedente en cooperación anti-narcotráfico, pero deja intacta la estructura operativa del cartel que continúa funcionando sin su liderazgo formal.

articles.title: The InSight Take: Does Kinahan’s Arrest Mark a New Chapter?
articles.author: Deborah Bonello
articles.summary: The InSight Take: Does Kinahan’s Arrest Mark a New Chapter?The arrest of Daniel Kinahan in Dubai has renewed focus on one of Europe’s most influential drug traffickers and the global reach of the Kinahan cartel. In this conversation, InSight Crime’s Deborah Bonello and Jeremy McDermott analyze how the network rose to prominence, what led to Kinahan’s arrest, and what it means for cocaine trafficki
articles.analysis: La captura de Kinahan ilustra los límites de la estrategia de descabezamiento contra redes resilientes que han descentralizado tanto sus finanzas como sus operaciones logísticas.

articles.title: The Boss in the Shadows: Rosalinda González Valencia’s Role in the CJNG
articles.author: Abby Pender
articles.summary: The Boss in the Shadows: Rosalinda González Valencia’s Role in the CJNGRosalinda González Valencia, alias "La Jefa," was involved in illicit activities long before meeting her husband, alias "El Mencho," and managed to establish herself as a key financial operator for the CJNG.The postThe Boss in the Shadows: Rosalinda González Valencia’s Role in the CJNGappeared first onInSight Crime.
articles.analysis: El perfil de González Valencia demuestra la centralidad del control financiero femenino en carteles mexicanos, contradiciendo narrativas que subestiman el poder operativo de las mujeres en estas organizaciones.

articles.title: Child sexual exploitation: 12 children identified during Europol’s Victim Identification Taskforce
articles.summary: From 13 to 24 April 2026, 34 specialists in victim identification from Europol, INTERPOL and 31 countries worldwide gathered at Europol’s headquarters in The Hague to identify victims and perpetrators of child sexual exploitation cases. As a result of the taskforce, 12 children were tentatively identified.
articles.analysis: La taskforce de Europol identifica apenas 12 víctimas menores en casos de explotación sexual, una cifra que subestima la magnitud real del problema según estimaciones de organizaciones especializadas.

articles.title: Europol and partners track down 45 forcibly transferred Ukrainian children
articles.summary: On 16 and 17 April 2026, Europol together with the Netherlands hosted a coordinated effort to identify and trace children forcibly transferred or deported to the temporarily occupied territories of Ukraine, the Russian Federation and the Republic of Belarus. In total, information about 45 children was uncovered and shared with Ukrainian authorities to assist their ongoing investigations.
articles.analysis: El rastreo de 45 menores ucranianos transferidos forzosamente revela capacidades operativas de cooperación europea, pero también la limitada efectividad ante la escala masiva de estas deportaciones.

articles.title: Factors that influence employees' perceptions and experiences of working within the treatment and recovery sector in England
articles.author: Elle Wadsworth
articles.summary: This study aims to help understand how the workforce transformation programme can support the development of the treatment and recovery workforce as part of the former UK government's 10-year drug strategy.
articles.analysis: El estudio británico sobre percepción laboral en tratamiento de drogas omite el análisis de cómo las políticas punitivas generan resistencia profesional y limitan la efectividad terapéutica.

articles.title: Implementation of the Treatment and Recovery Portfolio of the 'From Harm to Hope' drug strategy in England
articles.author: Sarah Parkinson
articles.summary: This process evaluation looks at the first three years of implementation of the Treatment and Recovery Portfolio of the UK government's 10-year drug strategy,From Harm to Hope.
articles.analysis: La evaluación de 'From Harm to Hope' mide implementación pero elude analizar si el enfoque de tratamiento reduce realmente el daño o simplemente reorganiza la criminalización.

articles.title: Implementation and early impacts of the Housing Support Grant in England
articles.author: Kayleigh Sharp
articles.summary: This study examined how the housing support grant had been implemented in England for people who use alcohol and/or other drugs. Findings show that the grant was generally implemented as planned and appeared to fill gaps in service provision.
articles.analysis: El Housing Support Grant aborda síntomas del problema de drogas en Inglaterra sin confrontar las causas estructurales que vinculan precariedad habitacional con uso problemático.

articles.title: The barriers and facilitators to supporting, commissioning and working with Lived Experience Recovery Organisations in systems of care in England
articles.author: Maggie Bradford
articles.summary: This study aims to identify the barriers and facilitators to supporting, commissioning and working with Lived Experience Recovery Organisations in effective systems of care for people who use alcohol and/or other drugs.
articles.analysis: La integración de organizaciones de experiencia vivida en sistemas de cuidado enfrenta resistencias institucionales que el estudio documenta pero no contextualiza como defensa corporativa del sector profesional.

articles.title: Mekong Risk Monitor #2
articles.author: Adrian Ancira
articles.summary: The postMekong Risk Monitor #2appeared first onGlobal Initiative.
articles.analysis: El monitor de riesgos del Mekong identifica patrones emergentes de crimen organizado en el sudeste asiático, región clave para rutas de precursores químicos hacia Europa.

articles.title: Confronting the hidden networks shaping violence in Central Africa
articles.author: Claudio Landi
articles.summary: The postConfronting the hidden networks shaping violence in Central Africaappeared first onGlobal Initiative.
articles.analysis: El análisis de redes violentas en África Central revela conexiones con mercados europeos de recursos naturales, pero subestima el papel de empresas extractivas en la perpetuación de estos circuitos.

articles.title: New Venezuelan Mining Law Obscures Old Corruption Problems
articles.author: Venezuela Investigation Unit
articles.summary: New Venezuelan Mining Law Obscures Old Corruption ProblemsA new mining law in Venezuela opens the gold sector to foreign investment but overlooks entrenched corruption and criminal control over production.The postNew Venezuelan Mining Law Obscures Old Corruption Problemsappeared first onInSight Crime.
articles.analysis: La nueva ley minera venezolana facilita inversión extranjera sin abordar el control criminal sobre la producción aurífera, perpetuando estructuras de blanqueo hacia mercados internacionales.

articles.title: National Cybersecurity Assessment Framework (NCAF) Tool
articles.author: n00kfq35
articles.summary: National Cybersecurity Assessment Framework (NCAF) ToolThe National Capabilities Assessment Framework 2.0 (NCAF 2.0) is a key EU instrument designed by ENISA to support Member States in assessing and strengthening their national cybersecurity capabilities. As a voluntary, flexible, and adaptable tool, it provides a structured methodology to evaluate maturity across 20 strategic objectives, enablin
articles.analysis: El framework de ciberseguridad nacional de ENISA standardiza evaluaciones de capacidades sin abordar cómo las vulnerabilidades cibernéticas facilitan operaciones de crimen organizado transnacional.
